members.name: Autodesk, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Engineering design and simulation platform layer — sells the dominant CAD/CAM/BIM toolchain (AutoCAD, Revit, Fusion 360) used to design physical products, buildings, and factories, increasingly integrating digital twin and generative design for manufacturing and construction.

members.name: Arista Networks, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Data-center networking toll-taker — sells EOS-powered Ethernet switches and software for AI cluster fabrics, replacing InfiniBand in many hyperscaler builds.

members.name: AppLovin Corporation
members.value_chain_position: AI-native advertising and monetization platform layer — sells an AI-driven programmatic ad engine (AXON) that acts as a performance marketing toll-taker between mobile/connected-TV app publishers and advertisers.

members.name: Arm Holdings plc American Depositary Shares
members.value_chain_position: CPU/NPU instruction-set architecture licensing — every mobile SoC, server CPU, AI inference chip and embedded controller pays ARM a royalty per unit shipped.

members.name: ASML Holding N.V.
members.value_chain_position: EUV and DUV lithography equipment — the singular chokepoint every leading-edge chip fab must use; no fab can manufacture <7nm chips without ASML's tools.

members.name: Bloom Energy Corporation
members.value_chain_position: Solid-oxide fuel cell manufacturer selling distributed power generation equipment (Energy Servers) primarily to data centers, utilities and industrial facilities — on-site clean baseload layer of the energy transition value chain.

members.name: BillionToOne, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Non-invasive prenatal and carrier screening diagnostics; sells cfDNA-based UNITY test consumables and sequencing kits to OBGYNs and clinical labs for fetal aneuploidy and carrier screening.

members.name: Boston Scientific Corporation
members.value_chain_position: Large-cap medtech; designs, manufactures, and sells cardiovascular, neuromodulation, urology, and endoscopy devices including electrophysiology mapping systems and robotic bronchoscopy (Ion).

members.name: BWX Technologies, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Sole-source naval nuclear reactor manufacturer for the US Navy; also supplies nuclear fuel, micro-reactors and medical radioisotopes — a regulated government monopoly with emerging commercial nuclear adjacencies.

members.name: Cameco Corporation
members.value_chain_position: Vertically integrated uranium miner and processor supplying nuclear fuel to utilities globally — nuclear-fuel-and-services layer of the energy-transition value chain, a direct chokepoint for SMR and existing fleet fuel supply.

members.name: Cellebrite DI Ltd.
members.value_chain_position: Digital intelligence and lawful-intercept analytics platform — sells forensic intelligence software to law enforcement, intelligence agencies, and national security bodies globally for extracting and analyzing data from mobile devices and digital sources.

members.name: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd
members.value_chain_position: High-speed connectivity silicon (AEC/Active Electrical Cables and SerDes PHY) — sells the active copper cable assemblies and retimer chips that link GPU clusters within AI data centers at speeds from 100G to 800G.

members.name: DLocal Limited
members.value_chain_position: Emerging-market payment processing rails for global merchants — sells a cross-border payment infrastructure layer enabling multinationals and global e-commerce companies to accept local payments, disburse payouts, and navigate FX in LatAm, Africa, and South/Southeast Asia.

members.name: Fair Isaac Corporation
members.value_chain_position: Credit-scoring analytics and decisioning software platform — occupies the market-data-and-analytics layer of fintech rails, providing a near-mandatory toll (the FICO score) on virtually every US consumer credit origination.

members.name: First Solar, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Thin-film cadmium-telluride solar module manufacturer — solar-manufacturing layer of the energy-transition value chain, selling domestically produced utility-scale modules in the US and internationally.

members.name: GE Aerospace
members.value_chain_position: Jet engine OEM and aftermarket service provider (LEAP, GE9X, F414/F110 military); sells engines as loss leaders and monetizes long-term service agreements — a classic installed-base toll model.

members.name: Globus Medical, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Designs and sells spine surgery implants and the ExcelsiusGPS robotic navigation platform; earns per-procedure implant revenue with robotic capital equipment driving consumable pull-through.

members.name: HEICO Corporation
members.value_chain_position: FAA-approved Parts Manufacturer Approval (PMA) replacement parts distributor and niche aerospace electronics manufacturer; operates as a structural cost-reduction toll on airline and defense MRO spend.

members.name: Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Sole US builder of nuclear-powered aircraft carriers and one of two nuclear submarine shipyards; sells large naval combatants under sole-source or duopoly DoD contracts with decades-long backlogs.

members.name: Howmet Aerospace Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Precision aerospace structures manufacturer — engine components (blades, vanes, discs), fasteners, and airframe structures for both commercial OEM and military platforms; sells engineered parts with long-term supply agreements.

members.name: IDEXX Laboratories, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Develops, manufactures, and sells veterinary diagnostics instruments and consumable test kits; operates a direct reference laboratory network for veterinary practices worldwide.

members.name: Intuit Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Financial management platform layer — operates the dominant SMB accounting/payroll OS (QuickBooks), consumer tax filing (TurboTax), and Credit Karma financial data network, collectively the operating layer for small business finance and consumer financial decisions.

members.name: Samsara Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Physical operations intelligence platform — sells IoT telematics hardware and AI-analytics SaaS to commercial fleets and industrial worksites; the operating system for connected physical operations.

members.name: Intuitive Surgical, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Designs, manufactures, and sells the da Vinci robotic surgery platform; earns upfront system revenue plus high-margin consumable instruments and service contracts per procedure.

members.name: Joint Stock Company Kaspi.kz
members.value_chain_position: Super-app payment and marketplace rails for Central Asia — operates Kazakhstan's dominant fintech ecosystem combining payments, e-commerce marketplace, and digital banking on a single app; the toll-taker on ~80% of Kazakhstan's digital payment volume.

members.name: Mastercard Incorporated
members.value_chain_position: Global payment network operator; owns Mastercard/Maestro/Cirrus rails plus Vocalink A2A infrastructure, taking per-transaction tolls across card and account-to-account flows.

members.name: Medpace Holdings, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Full-service contract research organization (CRO); designs and executes clinical trials for biotech/pharma clients; a pure-service picks-and-shovels layer for drug development.

members.name: ServiceNow, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Enterprise workflow automation and AI-agent platform — occupies the simulation/workflow-software layer, selling IT service management and cross-enterprise process automation that is increasingly AI-agent orchestrated.

members.name: NVIDIA Corporation
members.value_chain_position: AI accelerator chip design + CUDA software platform — the dominant compute layer every LLM/inference workload must run on.

members.name: nVent Electric plc
members.value_chain_position: Electrical enclosures, thermal management and power-distribution equipment supplier — occupies the power-and-cooling and electrification-components layer, selling into data centers, industrial and EV-charging infrastructure.

members.name: Penumbra, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Develops and sells neurovascular and vascular intervention devices including aspiration catheters, flow diverters, and a robotic endovascular platform (Robotic Assisted Vascular Catheter); earns per-procedure consumable pull-through.

members.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
members.value_chain_position: AI/ML operational decision platform — sells AIP (AI Platform), Foundry, and Gotham as the integration and decision layer sitting between raw AI models and operational enterprise/government workflows; a toll on every AI deployment that needs governed, auditable outputs.

members.name: Powell Industries, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Custom electrical switchgear and motor control centers manufacturer serving oil & gas, petrochemical, data center and utility customers — grid-equipment and electrification-components layer.

members.name: PTC Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Industrial software and IoT platform layer — sells PLM, CAD (Creo), and industrial IoT (ThingWorx) software that orchestrates the full product lifecycle and real-time factory floor data, directly enabling connected factory and robotics deployments.

members.name: Toast, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Restaurant-vertical payment OS — operates an integrated POS hardware + payment processing + SaaS platform for restaurants; takes a toll on every card swipe and subscription seat in the food-service stack.

members.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited
members.value_chain_position: Advanced fab layer — the world's sole source of leading-edge logic (3nm/2nm) that every AI accelerator, custom ASIC and smartphone AP must be built on.

members.name: Visa Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Global payment network operator; owns the rails (VisaNet) connecting ~15,000 issuers to ~100M merchant locations, taking a per-transaction toll on every card-based payment globally.

members.name: Vertiv Holdings Co
members.value_chain_position: Data-center power and thermal management infrastructure — sells power conversion systems, UPS, precision cooling, and liquid cooling solutions that every AI/HPC data center must install; a genuine chokepoint in the AI build-out value chain.

members.name: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Manufactures drug-delivery components (stoppers, closures, seals, drug-containment systems) that are required for every parenteral drug vial and biologic fill-finish line.

members.name: Woodward, Inc.
members.value_chain_position: Precision fuel and combustion control systems for aerospace engines (commercial + military) and industrial gas turbines (power generation); sells engineered sub-systems embedded in turbines as a sole-source or dual-source Tier 1 supplier.
